description: The automatic type-safe REST library for .NET Core, Xamarin and .NET. Heavily inspired by Square's Retrofit library, Refit turns your REST API into a live interface.
commit_message:
feat: reflection-free generated form serialization, opt-in null values, and public UniqueName (#2164)

* fix: avoid generated local variable name collisions with parameters

Inline and reflective generated method bodies used fixed local names
(refitSettings, refitRequest, refitArguments, refitRequestBuilder,
refitFunc), which produced CS0136 when a method parameter shared one of
those names. Allocate the locals through a per-method UniqueNameBuilder
seeded with the parameter names, so they are r
